case_title: SALEH ABDULLAH RUBAN VS. VENKAT NAGARAJU YAGATILA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY RUBAN, SALEH ABDULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT YAGATILA, VENKAT NAGARAJU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PARTIES REPORT THAT THE DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY HAS AGREED TO PAY THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SALEH ABDULLAH RUBAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VENKAT NAGARAJU YAGATILA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
